question: A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.
answer: The fault event F006 on transformer T-006 has been logged. The estimated downtime for the repair is 8 hours. A corrective work order WO-F2A90769 has been opened with high priority and assigned to technician TEC-03. The work order has been marked as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.
